::: {.callout-tip}
## Never heard of Mermaid?

Mermaid is an open source diagrams-as-code project. Learn more at <https://mermaid.ai/open-source/>.
:::

We also have all of the dependencies we need to include mermaidjs diagrams, thanks to the combination of using Quarto & Chrome in our base Docker image.

@fig-diagram-workflow-horizontal shows one mermaid diagram.

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-diagram-workflow-horizontal
%%| fig-cap: A horizontal mermaid diagram

flowchart LR
    A[(Data)] --> B(["Logic (R Code)"]) --> C[[PDF Report]]
```

And @fig-diagram-workflow-vertical shows the same diagram, vertically.

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-diagram-workflow-vertical
%%| fig-cap: A vertical mermaid diagram

flowchart TB
    A[(Data)] --> B(["Logic (R Code)"]) --> C[[PDF Report]]
```
